name: Production Workflow
description: Production-ready workflow: Production Workflow. This workflow has been optimized for production use with comprehensive error handling, security, and documentation.

parameters.query:
=-- CONSULTA DO PRODUTO GRADE
WITH pg as (
	SELECT
		id,
		id_produto,
		id_gradex,
		id_gradey,
		codigo 
	FROM
		produto_grade 
	WHERE
		id = '{{$node["emitirEtiqueta"].json["body"]["id_produto_grade"]}}'
),

-- CONSULTA DO PRODUTO
p as (
	SELECT * FROM produto 
	WHERE id IN ( SELECT id_produto  FROM pg)
	AND situacao = 'ATIVO'
),

-- CONSULTA TECIDO
t as (
	SELECT
		token,
		 JSON_UNQUOTE(json_extract( objeto, '$.largura')) AS largura
	FROM
		`{{$node["PegarConfiguracaoImpressao"].json["params"]["bancoRelatorio"]}}`.`i_objeto` 
	WHERE
		modulo = 'produto_grade_tecido'
		and token in (select id from pg)
		and situacao = 'ATIVO'
),


-- CONSULTA COMPOSICAO
cp as (
	
	SELECT
	  token,
    group_concat(concat(cps.participacao,'% ',cps.descricao)) as composicao
	FROM
		`{{$node["PegarConfiguracaoImpressao"].json["params"]["bancoRelatorio"]}}`.`i_objeto`,
		JSON_TABLE (
									objeto,
											'$[*]' COLUMNS (  
													participacao INT path '$.participacao',
													descricao TEXT path '$.descricao'
											)
							) AS cps 
		WHERE modulo = 'produto_grade_tecido_composicao'
		AND token in (select id from pg)
		AND situacao = 'ATIVO'
		AND cps.participacao > 0
		GROUP BY token
		ORDER BY participacao desc
		
)


-- CONSULTA RELATORIO
SELECT
{{$node["emitirEtiqueta"].json["body"]["id_movimentacao_detalhe"]}} as id_movimentacao_detalhe ,
     pg.id, 
	pg.codigo,
	p.descricao,
	m.nome as marca,
	gx.nome as gradex,
	gy.nome as gradey,
	curdate() as data_entrada,
  t.largura,
	cp.composicao
FROM
	pg inner join p on (p.id = pg.id_produto)
	inner join marca m on(m.id = p.id_marca)
	left join grade gx on (gx.id = pg.id_gradex)
	left join grade gy on (gy.id = pg.id_gradey)
	left join t on (t.token = pg.id)
	left join cp on (cp.token = pg.id)

parameters.query:
=-- CONSULTA DO PRODUTO GRADE
WITH pg as (
	SELECT
		id,
		id_produto,
		id_gradex,
		id_gradey,
		codigo 
	FROM
		produto_grade 
	WHERE
		id = '{{$node["emitirEtiqueta"].json["body"]["id_produto_grade"]}}'
),

-- CONSULTA DO PRODUTO
p as (
	SELECT * FROM produto 
	WHERE id IN ( SELECT id_produto  FROM pg)
	AND situacao = 'ATIVO'
),

-- CONSULTA TECIDO
t as (
	SELECT
		token,
		 JSON_UNQUOTE(json_extract( objeto, '$.largura')) AS largura
	FROM
		`{{$node["PegarConfiguracaoImpressao"].json["params"]["bancoRelatorio"]}}`.`i_objeto` 
	WHERE
		modulo = 'produto_grade_tecido'
		and token in (select id from pg)
		and situacao = 'ATIVO'
),


-- CONSULTA COMPOSICAO
cp as (
	
	SELECT
	  token,
    group_concat(concat(cps.participacao,'% ',cps.descricao)) as composicao
	FROM
		`{{$node["PegarConfiguracaoImpressao"].json["params"]["bancoRelatorio"]}}`.`i_objeto`,
		JSON_TABLE (
									objeto,
											'$[*]' COLUMNS (  
													participacao INT path '$.participacao',
													descricao TEXT path '$.descricao'
											)
							) AS cps 
		WHERE modulo = 'produto_grade_tecido_composicao'
		AND token in (select id from pg)
		AND situacao = 'ATIVO'
		AND cps.participacao > 0
		GROUP BY token
		ORDER BY participacao desc
		
)


-- CONSULTA RELATORIO
SELECT
{{$node["emitirEtiqueta"].json["body"]["id_movimentacao_detalhe"]}} as id_movimentacao_detalhe ,
     pg.id, 
	pg.codigo,
	p.descricao,
	m.nome as marca,
	gx.nome as gradex,
	gy.nome as gradey,
	curdate() as data_entrada,
  t.largura,
	cp.composicao
FROM
	pg inner join p on (p.id = pg.id_produto)
	inner join marca m on(m.id = p.id_marca)
	left join grade gx on (gx.id = pg.id_gradex)
	left join grade gy on (gy.id = pg.id_gradey)
	left join t on (t.token = pg.id)
	left join cp on (cp.token = pg.id)

prerequisites: An active n8n instance installed locally, in a Docker container, or hosted on n8n Cloud.
Basic familiarity with importing JSON templates in n8n.
setupInstructions: Download the JSON configuration for this workflow.
Ensure you set up credentials for all connected integrations.
Test your trigger and run execution.
configurationSteps: Copy the Test Webhook URL provided by n8n.
Configure your source application (e.g. Stripe, Typeform) to send event payloads to this URL.
Open the "dadosProduto" node (n8n-nodes-base.mySql) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "PegarConfiguracaoImpressao" node (n8n-nodes-base.httpRequest) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "dadosRolo" node (n8n-nodes-base.postgres) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "trataRetorno" node (n8n-nodes-base.function) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "roloProduto" node (n8n-nodes-base.merge) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Error Handler" node (n8n-nodes-base.stopAndError) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
No global variables node (Set node) is present. If you need dynamic constants, add a Set node after the trigger.
testingSteps: Click the "Test step" or "Listen for test event" button on your Trigger node.
Send a test trigger from your source service (e.g. fill a test form or trigger a webhook trigger).
Verify that the node canvas lights up green, indicating successful data flow.
Open the final destination node to confirm that output records were saved correctly.
instructions.expectedResult: Upon trigger activation, inputs will flow through the configured nodes and execute actions successfully.
troubleshooting: Check credential warning symbols. Most workflow issues stem from expired OAuth connections or missing API permissions.
Verify that the data keys coming from your Trigger node match the exact names mapped in subsequent nodes (e.g., {{ $json.body.email }}).
Open the Execution history tab in n8n to view logs and determine which node failed.
securityNotes: Never hardcode API keys, passwords, or authentication bearer tokens in the plain text fields of node parameters.
If you download or share this workflow JSON, sanitize any sensitive parameters or configuration nodes.
customizationIdeas: Add an email node at the end to notify you of successful executions.
Incorporate an AI LLM node to summarize trigger payloads before writing them to integrations.
